members.name: BundleGraphAdder
ExperimentalFeatures
members.content:
Use `__EXPERIMENTAL__.x` to check if feature `x` is enabled. It will be replaced with `true` or `false` via an exact string replacement. Add experimental features to this enum definition. ```typescript export declare enum ExperimentalFeatures ```
Member Value Description
each `"each"` Enable the Each keyed-list primitive
enableRequestRewrite `"enableRequestRewrite"` Enable request.rewrite()
insights `"insights"` Enable the ability to use the Qwik Insights vite plugin and `` component
noSPA `"noSPA"` Disable SPA navigation handler in Qwik Router
preventNavigate `"preventNavigate"` Enable the usePreventNavigate hook
valibot `"valibot"` Enable the Valibot form validation
webWorker `"webWorker"` Enable worker$

members.name: QwikBundleGraph
members.content:
Bundle graph.

Format: \[ 'bundle-a.js', 3, 5 // Depends on 'bundle-b.js' and 'bundle-c.js' 'bundle-b.js', 5, // Depends on 'bundle-c.js' 'bundle-c.js', \]


```typescript
export type QwikBundleGraph = Array<string | number>;
```

members.name: QwikManifest
members.content:
The metadata of the build. One of its uses is storing where QRL symbols are located. ```typescript export interface QwikManifest ```
Property Modifiers Type Description
[assets?](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.assets.md) { \[fileName: string\]: [QwikAsset](#qwikasset); } _(Optional)_ All assets. The key is the fileName relative to the rootDir
[bundleGraph?](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.bundlegraph.md) [QwikBundleGraph](#qwikbundlegraph) _(Optional)_ All bundles in a compact graph format with probabilities
[bundleGraphAsset?](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.bundlegraphasset.md) string _(Optional)_ The bundle graph fileName
[bundles](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.bundles.md) { \[fileName: string\]: [QwikBundle](#qwikbundle); } All code bundles, used to know the import graph. The key is the bundle fileName relative to "build/"
[core?](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.core.md) string _(Optional)_ The Qwik core bundle fileName
[injections?](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.injections.md) [GlobalInjections](#globalinjections)\[\] _(Optional)_ CSS etc to inject in the document head
[manifestHash](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.manifesthash.md) string Content hash of the manifest, if this changes, the code changed
[mapping](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.mapping.md) { \[symbolName: string\]: string; } Where QRLs are located. The key is the symbol name, the value is the bundle fileName
[options?](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.options.md) { target?: string; buildMode?: string; entryStrategy?: { type: EntryStrategy\['type'\]; }; } _(Optional)_ The options used to build the manifest
[platform?](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.platform.md) { \[name: string\]: string; } _(Optional)_ The platform used to build the manifest
[preloader?](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.preloader.md) string _(Optional)_ The preloader bundle fileName
[qwikLoader?](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.qwikloader.md) string _(Optional)_ The Qwik loader bundle fileName
[symbols](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.symbols.md) { \[symbolName: string\]: [QwikSymbol](#qwiksymbol); } QRL symbols
[version](./qwik-vite.qwikmanifest.version.md) string The version of the manifest

members.name: qwikRollup
members.content:
```typescript export declare function qwikRollup(qwikRollupOpts?: QwikRollupPluginOptions): any; ```
Parameter Type Description
qwikRollupOpts [QwikRollupPluginOptions](#qwikrolluppluginoptions) _(Optional)_
**Returns:** any

members.name: QwikRollupPluginOptions
members.content:
```typescript export interface QwikRollupPluginOptions ```
Property Modifiers Type Description
[buildMode?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.buildmode.md) [QwikBuildMode](#qwikbuildmode) _(Optional)_ Build `production` or `development`. Default `development`
[csr?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.csr.md) boolean _(Optional)_
[debug?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.debug.md) boolean _(Optional)_ Prints verbose Qwik plugin debug logs. Default `false`
[entryStrategy?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.entrystrategy.md) EntryStrategy _(Optional)_ The Qwik entry strategy to use while building for production. During development the type is always `segment`. Default `{ type: "smart" }`)
[experimental?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.experimental.md) (keyof typeof [ExperimentalFeatures](#experimentalfeatures))\[\] _(Optional)_ Experimental features. These can come and go in patch releases, and their API is not guaranteed to be stable between releases.
[lint?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.lint.md) boolean _(Optional)_ Run eslint on the source files for the ssr build or dev server. This can slow down startup on large projects. Defaults to `true`
[manifestInput?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.manifestinput.md) [QwikManifest](#qwikmanifest) _(Optional)_ The SSR build requires the manifest generated during the client build. The `manifestInput` option can be used to manually provide a manifest. Default `undefined`
[manifestOutput?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.manifestoutput.md) (manifest: [QwikManifest](#qwikmanifest)) => Promise<void> \| void _(Optional)_ The client build will create a manifest and this hook is called with the generated build data. Default `undefined`
[optimizerOptions?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.optimizeroptions.md) OptimizerOptions _(Optional)_
[rootDir?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.rootdir.md) string _(Optional)_ The root of the application, which is commonly the same directory as `package.json` and `rollup.config.js`. Default `process.cwd()`
[srcDir?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.srcdir.md) string _(Optional)_ The source directory to find all the Qwik components. Since Qwik does not have a single input, the `srcDir` is used to recursively find Qwik files. Default `src`
[srcInputs?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.srcinputs.md) TransformModuleInput\[\] \| null _(Optional)_ Alternative to `srcDir`, where `srcInputs` is able to provide the files manually. This option is useful for an environment without a file system, such as a webworker. Default: `null`
[target?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.target.md) [QwikBuildTarget](#qwikbuildtarget) _(Optional)_ Target `client` or `ssr`. Default `client`
[transformedModuleOutput?](./qwik-vite.qwikrolluppluginoptions.transformedmoduleoutput.md) ((transformedModules: TransformModule\[\]) => Promise<void> \| void) \| null _(Optional)_ Hook that's called after the build and provides all of the transformed modules that were used before bundling.

members.name: qwikVite
members.content:
The types for Vite/Rollup don't allow us to be too specific about the return type. The correct return type is `[QwikVitePlugin, VitePlugin]`, and if you search the plugin by name you'll get the `QwikVitePlugin`. ```typescript export declare function qwikVite(qwikViteOpts?: QwikVitePluginOptions): any; ```
Parameter Type Description
qwikViteOpts [QwikVitePluginOptions](#qwikvitepluginoptions) _(Optional)_
**Returns:** any

members.name: ServerQwikManifest
members.content:
The manifest values that are needed for SSR.


```typescript
export type ServerQwikManifest = Pick<QwikManifest, 'manifestHash' | 'injections' | 'bundleGraph' | 'bundleGraphAsset' | 'mapping' | 'preloader' | 'core' | 'qwikLoader'>;
```
**References:** [QwikManifest](#qwikmanifest)

```typescript
export type SymbolMapperFn = (symbolName: string, mapper: SymbolMapper | undefined, parent?: string) => readonly [symbol: string, chunk: string] | undefined;
```
